manuals.purpose: 面向用户和人工接入的部署、Discord 接入、Feishu deferred adapter、数据、日常使用和故障排查手册；已同步 field_source/confidence double check、冻结版 CanonicalTaskBrief、artifact-level ReviewGate、MemoryGateway scope filter、SearchGateway 当前事实和简历/JD artifact 优先边界

planned_stack.database: PostgreSQL + pgvector first-version runtime; SQLite only for temporary personal experiments
planned_stack.feishu: Deferred adapter only; current historical code may be reused but is not first-version main path
planned_stack.tests: pytest, ruff, fake/mock gateway contract tests
planned_stack.workspace: Discord First: slash commands, buttons, select menus, modals, War Room threads/messages
planned_stack.agent_architecture: Frozen CanonicalTaskBrief + sourced structured artifacts + artifact-level ReviewGate + AgentSOPRegistry; no free agent-to-agent chat
planned_stack.memory: PostgreSQL + pgvector MemoryGateway with tenant/guild/user/project/requisition/candidate scope filter and 30d / 90d / permanent retention policy
planned_stack.deployment: Docker Compose server baseline with api, worker, postgres(pgvector), and caddy HTTPS reverse proxy

runtime_decisions.full_council_trigger: User explicitly asks for 三省六部 or full council review
runtime_decisions.artifact_state_policy: LangGraph state stores artifact refs and summaries only; full content is read from ArtifactStore content_ref
runtime_decisions.context_pack_policy: AgentHarness.build_context_pack injects only current-node task_brief, artifact refs/summaries, MemoryRef, source refs, and budget; never full chat history, full RecruitmentState, full node_history, all AgentRuns, all artifacts, or all long-term memory
runtime_decisions.vector_memory_policy: First-version runtime uses PostgreSQL + pgvector via MemoryGateway, VectorMemoryStore, and EmbeddingGateway; retrieval fails closed without thread or tenant/guild/user/project/requisition/candidate scope filters, applies compatible scope matching where provided boundaries allow same value or NULL generalized memory and missing boundaries exclude more-specific memory, then applies pgvector recall, weighting/rerank, MMR dedupe, token compression, and audit
runtime_decisions.side_effect_policy: War Room progress/question/approval/result cards may auto-send after task authorization; business writes, docs, tasks, outreach, and recommendation conclusions require interrupt approval
runtime_decisions.task_authorization_policy: /tasks/authorize is a protected internal bridge: approved defaults to false; approved=true returns the selected council_mode/mode_reason, stores a short authorization payload ref, creates a queued GraphThread, and enqueues graph_dispatch for the worker without running graph synchronously or executing business side effects
runtime_decisions.inspection_policy: GET /threads/{thread_id} and GET /runs/{run_id} expose status, summaries, refs, pending interrupts, and token estimates only; they must not read ArtifactBlob content, raw prompts, or full ContextPack payloads
runtime_decisions.internal_approval_policy: GET /approvals/{interrupt_id} exposes ActionProposal summary only; POST /approvals/{interrupt_id}/decision writes HumanApproval plus resume outbox and never directly executes business side effects
runtime_decisions.action_approval_policy: Business subgraphs produce draft artifact refs, ActionGate creates an idempotent ActionProposal and interrupt payload, HumanApproval resumes the same thread, and ActionExecutor queues approved side effects only after validating the proposal
runtime_decisions.feishu_event_policy: /feishu/events verifies/decrypts/challenges, commits FeishuEventLog plus persistent outbox before ACK, ACKs within 3 seconds, then asynchronously dispatches headhunter_war_room_graph with atomic claim
runtime_decisions.feishu_card_action_policy: /feishu/card-actions is a deferred adapter path; non-challenge callbacks require signed timestamp/nonce/signature, thread_id/action_id/interrupt_id/idempotency_key must match a pending ActionProposal, idempotency uses DB unique constraints and atomic claim, then resumes the same thread_id
runtime_decisions.feishu_gateway_policy: FeishuAuthProvider, FeishuGateway, and FeishuBitableGateway are deferred adapter components for token cache/refresh, scope/401 errors, bot availability checks, Retry-After/rate-limit backoff, dead letter, Bitable batching, upsert, record_id mapping, and partial failure audit
